title: Add reconciliation test cases for missing benchmark variants
body:
Expand the `test_reconcile.py` to include test cases for all 20 benchmark variants using the existing alias data.

**Tasks**:
- Add tests for `E545K`, `METex14`, and other medium-priority benchmarks.
- Ensure all tests pass without regression.

**Acceptance Criteria**:
- All 20 benchmark variants are covered in `test_reconcile.py`.
- Tests pass without errors in CI.

**Assignee**: @nikola
**Labels**: backend, test, priority:high, blocked (waiting for aliases)

title: Build embedding function stub in reconcile.py
body:
Create a placeholder embedding similarity function (`None` output until model is integrated). Define a clear interface for later wiring.

**Acceptance Criteria**:
- Clear function signature is created and documented.
- Tests validate placeholder behavior.

**Assignee**: @nikola
**Labels**: backend, ML, priority:medium

title: Add critical alias updates to variant_aliases.json
body:
Update alias maps to include missing variants like `E545K`, `METex14`, `ALK rearrangement`. Ensure canonical names match `nsclc_benchmark.csv`.

**Acceptance Criteria**:
- Alias data is updated and valid.
- No regressions or errors in alias mapping.

**Assignee**: @rin
**Labels**: data, priority:high, P0

title: Add evidence rows for new aliases in evidence_map.csv
body:
Add source and traceability documentation for newly added aliases (e.g., terms like `E545K` → `PIK3CA p.E545K`).

**Acceptance Criteria**:
- Evidence rows exist for all new alias mappings.
- Fields such as `source`, `description`, and `entity_type` are complete and valid.

**Assignee**: @rin
**Labels**: data, QA

title: Create explain.py with deterministic rendering for reconciliations
body:
Implement `build_explanation()` to generate explainability text based on confidence/review status, following predefined templates.

**Acceptance Criteria**:
- Explanations are deterministic and consistent.
- Tests validate all HIGH, MEDIUM, and LOW scenarios.

**Assignee**: @michael
**Labels**: backend, explainability, priority:high

title: Generate explainability_eval.csv with benchmark outputs
body:
Use the backend to manually reconcile benchmark cases. Populate 20 evaluator rows (`confidence`, `explanation`) for clinician review.

**Acceptance Criteria**:
- `explainability_eval.csv` is valid and aligned with benchmarks.
- Outputs support reviewer scoring.

**Assignee**: @michael
**Labels**: backend, QA, data

title: Add evidence list rendering to the result UI
body:
Extend the result table in `main.jsx` to display a bulleted list of evidence (`source`, `description`) under each result row.

**Acceptance Criteria**:
- Evidence renders correctly in the result table.
- Frontend functionality remains intact.

**Assignee**: @anne
**Labels**: frontend, priority:high

title: Build CSV upload + mock results table in the UI
body:
Add CSV upload functionality in `main.jsx`. Map data to table rows using mock data (`mockResult`), and prepare API integration later.

**Acceptance Criteria**:
- CSV upload and mock data result table are working.
- Ready for wiring API integration.

**Assignee**: @anne
**Labels**: frontend, priority:medium, blocked

title: Set up GitHub Actions CI for backend tests
body:
Create `.github/workflows/backend-ci.yml` to automate `pytest` for backend tests. Ensure it runs on PRs and branch pushes.

**Acceptance Criteria**:
- CI workflow file is valid and runs successfully in PRs.
- Tests execute without errors in multiple environments.

**Assignee**: @eric
**Labels**: DevOps, priority:high

title: Add .env.local for frontend API configuration
body:
Replace hardcoded API URLs with environment-based configuration in `main.jsx` (Vite). Add `frontend/.env.local` for default values.

**Acceptance Criteria**:
- Environment-based API configuration works locally and in CI.
- Frontend/API integration is simplified for developers.

**Assignee**: @eric
**Labels**: platform, frontend-support, priority:medium
